scripts.dev:guard: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ports=@(3000,3100); foreach ($port in $ports) { $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($conn) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Output ('Cleared stale listener PID ' + $conn.OwningProcess + ' on port ' + $port) } else { Write-Output ('Port ' + $port + ' clear') } }"
scripts.dev: npm run dev:guard && npm run dev:reset && next dev --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3000
